# Alchemy Tattoo Collective — Salem, OR
> Alchemy Tattoo Collective is a licensed tattoo & piercing studio in Salem, Oregon offering custom tattoos, cover-ups, piercing, and bilingual (English/Spanish) service. 220 Liberty St NE. Call (503) 332-3298. Book a free consult.

## Services
- Custom tattoos
- Cover-ups
- Fine-line & blackwork
- Flash & walk-ins
- Piercing
- Jewelry

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 332-3298 · Hours: Walk-ins 12–6 · otherwise by appointment · Languages: English, Español
